lineas.texto: Not very well. I've got a headache.
Yes, a little. And my throat hurts too.
You should rest and drink water.
I think I have a cold.
Take this medicine twice a day.
Thank you, I hope I feel better soon.

preguntas.enunciado: ¿Qué le duele a B además de la cabeza?
¿Cuántas veces al día debe tomar la medicina?
